prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约887→1266→1348→1359→1478，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约591名；2025年基准约1478名，较2024年再后移1 19名，下行趋势明确；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为94人，2024年降至89人，2025年略回升至90人；2026年计划大幅增至126人，较2025年扩招40%， 显著增加录取机会，但考生规模同步扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第18名，近年稳定在Top20，属于顶尖工科强校；2026年声誉 评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件及历史断档舆情；抖音热度排名第26位（较热），曝光量中等；2022–2023年因土木工程断档事件受到广泛关注，对报考心理有滞后影响；土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A、临床医学B+等，工科与医学实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业持续高热推荐；土木建筑持续劝退。本省2026年考生总数218700人，较2025年（179817人）增长约21.6%，物理类估算约14 7623人（较2025年121443人增长21.5%），竞争明显加剧；同济大学位于上海，对甘肃考生吸引力较强；该校在甘肃招生 占比约1.2%（2025年），属跨省招生中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招40%与考生总数增长约21.5%的供需对冲、声誉偏负面及土木建筑劝 退对报考热度的压制，在2025年基准1478名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约1863名，区间1639–2087名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（国豪精英班）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划班）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）。

- 理科试验班（数学与应用数学、统计学等）
- 工科试验班（信息与智能网联类）
- 工科试验班（智能化制造与新能源类）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1863名，区间1639–2087名。位次在区间下限（1639名）以内可重点冲刺一档国豪精英班和卓越计划班；位次在区间中段（约1800–1900名）建议以二档信息类、理科 试验班为主，搭配三档医学试验班保底；位次接近区间上限（2087名）应以三档土木类、交通类、医学试验班为主，谨慎冲刺二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 887 → 1266 → 1348 → 1359 → 1478, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 591 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1478, a further backward shift of 119 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 94 students each year from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 89 in 2024, and slightly rebounded to 90 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 126 students, a 40% expansion compared to 2025, notably increasing admission opportunities, but the number of examinees is also expanding simultaneously.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the Top 20 in recent years, belonging to top-tier engineering strong schools; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents and historical cutoff scandals; Douyin popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure; from 2022 to 2023, it received widespread attention due to the cutoff incident in Civil Engineering, which has a lagging impact on application psychology; Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Clinical Medicine B+, etc., with outstanding engineering and medical strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine and other majors continue to be highly recommended; Civil Engineering and Architecture continue to be discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (179,817); the estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 147,623 (an increase of 21.5% compared to 121,443 in 2025), indicating intensified competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong attraction for Gansu examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), which is a moderate level of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the supply-demand offset of a 40% enrollment expansion in 2026 versus a 21.5% increase in total examinees, the negative reputation, and the suppression of application enthusiasm due to the discouragement of Civil Engineering and Architecture, based on the 2025 baseline of 1478, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1863, with a range of 1639–2087.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information and Intelligent Networking)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and New Energy)
- Architecture Class (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc.)
- Medical Experimental Class (Basic Medicine Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Civil Engineering, Intelligent Construction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Transportation and Vehicles).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1863, range 1639–2087. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1639) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Guohao Elite Class and Excellence Plan Class; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 1800–1900) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 Information Class and Science Experimental Class, supplemented by Tier 3 Medical Experimental Class as a safety; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (2087) should mainly target Tier 3 Civil Engineering, Transportation, and Medical Experimental Classes, and cautiously sprint for Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024–2025年历史类最低位次约285→235，2025年较2024年前移50名，呈上升趋势；2025年基准约235名；本省历史类计划2024–2025年均为4人；2026年计划增至5人，较2025年扩招25%，录取机会略有增加。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第18名，近年稳定在Top20；2026年 声誉评价偏负面；抖音热度排名第26位（较热）；历史类仅人文科学试验班一个专业，受整体声誉影响有限；外国语言文学A-、马克思主义理论A-等，人文社科 实力不俗。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 人文科学试验班涵盖传播学、德语、英语、哲学、汉语言文学等，其中汉语言/中文专业热度推荐，外语类一般观望。本省2026年历史类考生 估算约71078人（较2025年58374人增长约21.8%），竞争加剧；同济大学位于上海，对甘肃文科考生吸引力较强；历史类 招生人数极少（4–5人），位次波动受个别高分考生影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移趋势、2026年小幅扩招25%与考生总数增长约21.8%的供需对冲、人文社科专 业热度平稳，在2025年基准235名基础上预计位次略有后移；预测最低位次约285名，区间251–319名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人文科学试验班（传播学、德语、英语（数智人文）、日语、哲学、文化产业管理、汉语言文学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅有人文科学试验班一个招生专业，无分档必要。预测位次约285名，区间251–319名。位次在区间下限（251名）以内录取把握较大；位次接近区间上限（319名）存在一 定风险，建议搭配其他院校保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2024–2025 minimum ranking for History Category approximately 285→235, moving up 50 places in 2025 compared to 2024, showing an upward trend; 2025 baseline approximately 235; provincial History Category enrollment plan 4 persons for both 2024–2025; 2026 plan increases to 5 persons, expanding by 25% compared to 2025, slightly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2026 18th, stable in Top20 in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative; Douyin popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot); History Category only has Humanities Experimental Class as a major, limited impact from overall reputation; Foreign Language and Literature A-, Marxist Theory A-, etc., humanities and social sciences strength is considerable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Humanities Experimental Class covers Communication Studies, German, English, Philosophy, Chinese Language and Literature, etc., among which Chinese Language/Chinese major is recommended as popular, foreign languages generally wait-and-see. Estimated number of History Category examinees in this province for 2026 approximately 71,078 (an increase of about 21.8% from 58,374 in 2025), intensifying competition; Tongji University located in Shanghai, has strong appeal to Gansu liberal arts examinees; History Category enrollment is extremely small (4–5 persons), ranking fluctuations are significantly affected by individual high-scoring examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight 25% expansion in 2026 offset by an approximately 21.8% increase in total examinees, and stable popularity of humanities and social sciences majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 235, the ranking is expected to slightly move back; predicted minimum ranking approximately 285, range 251–319.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Communication Studies, German, English (Digital Humanities), Japanese, Philosophy, Cultural Industry Management, Chinese Language and Literature).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only has one enrollment major, Humanities Experimental Class, no need for tier division. Predicted ranking approximately 285, range 251–319. Rankings within the lower limit of the range (251) have a higher chance of admission; rankings near the upper limit of the range (319) carry some risk, it is recommended to pair with other institutions as a safety.
